name: Anna Yamada
bio: A popular junior high student and model who loves to eat. She has a quirky and innocent personality.

name: Kiyotaka Ayanokoji
bio: A quiet and unassuming student in Class D with extraordinary intellectual and physical abilities.

name: Kyotaro Ichikawa
bio: An introverted middle schooler who initially struggles with social interactions and his own imagination.

name: Light Yagami
bio: A brilliant high school student who discovers a supernatural notebook that allows him to kill anyone.

name: Hachiman Hikigaya
bio: A cynical student who is forced to join the Service Club to help others with their social problems.

name: L Lawliet
bio: The world's greatest detective known for his eccentric habits and unrivaled deductive skills.

name: Izumi Miyamura
bio: A gentle student who hides his tattoos and piercings at school to avoid being judged.

name: Maki Zenin
bio: A powerful sorcerer who relies on physical prowess and cursed tools rather than innate energy.

name: Yuji Itadori
bio: A kind-hearted high schooler who becomes the vessel for the King of Curses, Ryomen Sukuna.

name: Hinata Hyuga
bio: A kunoichi from the Hyuga clan who overcomes her shyness through hard work and inspiration.

name: Rintaro Tsumugi
bio: A student at Chidori High who looks intimidating but is actually incredibly kind and hardworking at his family's cake shop.

name: Subaru Natsuki
bio: Transported to another world, he possesses the ability to rewind time by dying.
